description: Add supplier contract creation flow: menu options, wizard branching, repeatable contract form, DB schema, document uploads, and reminder interventions before notice date.

userStories.title: DB migration: supplier_contracts + supplier_contract_documents tables
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the supplier_contracts and supplier_contract_documents tables with proper RLS, indexes, and XOR constraint, so that supplier contracts can be stored securely.
acceptanceCriteria: supplier_contracts table created with all columns from design
RLS policies based on team_members (is_team_manager for writes, team membership for reads)
Indexes on team_id, building_id, lot_id, status, notice_date
npm run supabase:types regenerates types successfully
userStories.notes: Migration 20260311100000_supplier_contracts.sql — 2 tables, XOR constraint, 8 RLS policies, 7 indexes, updated_at trigger, types regenerated

userStories.title: DB migration: rappel_preavis_fournisseur intervention type
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a new intervention type category 'Contrats fournisseurs' with type 'Rappel préavis fournisseur', so reminder interventions can be created for supplier contracts.
acceptanceCriteria: intervention_types row for 'Rappel préavis fournisseur' linked to category
Existing cron job can pick up interventions of this type (no cron changes needed)

userStories.title: TypeScript types + Repository + Service for supplier contracts
userStories.description: As a developer, I want SupplierContract types, repository, and service layers, so the backend can CRUD supplier contracts following SEIDO patterns.
acceptanceCriteria: SupplierContractFormData type defined with all fields
SupplierContractRepository with create (bulk), findByTeam, findByBuilding, findByLot methods
SupplierContractService wrapping repository with business logic
Repository uses .limit(1) not .single() for multi-team safety
userStories.notes: Types, repository, service created. Exports added to lib/services/index.ts. Lint clean.

userStories.title: Server action: createSupplierContractsAction
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a server action that bulk-creates supplier contracts with document uploads and optional reminder interventions.
acceptanceCriteria: Zod validation of contract array input
Document upload to contract-documents bucket with correct path
userStories.notes: supplier-contract-actions.ts: createSupplierContractsAction + uploadSupplierContractDocumentsAction + reminder interventions. Lint clean.

userStories.title: Navigation: separate menu entries for Bail and Contrat fournisseur
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want separate 'Bail locatif' and 'Contrat fournisseur' options in the sidebar and contracts page, so I can choose which type to create.
acceptanceCriteria: Sidebar '+' button for Contrats shows dropdown with 2 options
Contracts page 'Nouveau contrat' button shows dropdown with 2 options
userStories.notes: Sidebar dropdown via createOptions pattern. Page dropdown via DropdownMenu. Both route to ?type= param.

userStories.title: PropertySelector: add onBuildingSelect callback
userStories.description: As a developer, I want PropertySelector to support an onBuildingSelect callback and respect hideBuildingSelect={false} for the supplier flow, so buildings can be selected in the wizard.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking building select button calls onBuildingSelect and highlights building
userStories.notes: Already implemented — onBuildingSelect prop, building select buttons, toggle behavior exist. Just needs hideBuildingSelect={false} in fournisseur mode.

userStories.title: Wizard branching: contractMode prop + supplier step config
userStories.description: As a developer, I want contract-form-container to accept contractMode and render different steps for 'fournisseur' mode, so the wizard branches correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: supplierContractSteps config added to step-configurations.ts (Bien, Contrats, Interventions, Confirmation)
Step 1 uses hideBuildingSelect={false} for fournisseur mode
formData stores buildingId or lotId based on selection
Steps 2+ render different components based on mode
userStories.notes: Branching via isSupplierMode. activeSteps switches step config. renderStepContent branches for supplier mode. handleSupplierSubmit created. Lint clean.

userStories.title: UI: Supplier contracts repeatable form (Step 2)
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want a repeatable form to add multiple supplier contracts with reference, supplier, cost, dates, notice period, and attachments.
acceptanceCriteria: ContactSelector filtered type=prestataire for supplier selection
Start date / End date side by side on same line
File upload (multiple) per contract, staged until submission
Add contract button at bottom, delete button per card (min 1)
userStories.notes: Implemented in US-007 — SupplierContractsStep with repeatable form, Select for prestataire, file upload, add/remove, dates side by side.

userStories.title: UI: Supplier interventions step (Step 3) + Confirmation (Step 4)
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to optionally schedule reminder interventions before notice dates, and review all contracts before submission.
acceptanceCriteria: Step 3 shows proposed reminders for contracts with end_date + notice_period
Same pattern as lease-interventions-step (date, assignation config)
Step 4 shows summary of all contracts, suppliers, costs, dates, documents
Success redirects to building or lot detail page
userStories.notes: Reminder step with checkbox per contract (auto-assigns current user). Confirmation step shows summary. handleSupplierSubmit wired. Redirect to building/lot detail.
